## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages / screenshots).

## Environment

- Deployment: [local / Vercel / other]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.11]
- Browser (if UI): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Commit / version:

## Additional context

Anything else relevant. **Do not include real member data, secrets, or API keys.**
